allow: Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"qwen3.6:latest","prompt":"Say OK","stream":false}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('response',''\)\)")

Bash(time curl -s http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"qwen3.6:latest","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are an automotive diagnostics planner. Return ONLY a JSON object with key plan as an array of 3-5 concise steps. No explanation or markdown, only valid JSON."},{"role":"user","content":"2014 Ford Focus rough idle and intermittent check engine light"}],"stream":false,"think":false}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['choices'][0]['message']['content']\)")
